action.reasoning: First iteration: build a complete pipeline with U-Net architecture, train for a few epochs to get baseline score and measure iteration time. Using spherical convolutions (periodic lon padding, reflection lat padding), residual learning, latitude-weighted MSE loss, and mixed precision training.
